Skill.source: Item:8:The Hand of Phrecia, Mesh Gloves

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Widowhail Crude Bow Unique ID: 2246db7169d94f2bd80234fe384736140ffc65dda13b5717acdcc6642554eccc Item Level: 71 Quality: 0 Sockets: W-W-W-W-W-W Implicits: 0 247% increased bonuses gained from Equipped Quiver Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE The Eternal Struggle Onyx Amulet Unique ID: 9d84da3a3a1afe3e5e5f074acdc46b251fa4ecfb1c2a75730f143aefa8b175ae Item Level: 81 LevelReq: 20 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Allocates Robust While a Unique Enemy is in your Presence, 25% increased Evasion Rating 16% increased effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills +28 to Strength +58 to Dexterity +48 to Intelligence 15% increased Global Defences Critical Strikes inflict Malignant Madness if The Eater of Worlds is dominant Kill Enemies that have 15% or lower Life on Hit if The Searing Exarch is dominant

Rarity: UNIQUE Maloney's Mechanism Ornate Quiver Unique ID: b88bc852d3fd75000f25846da88f4b9f65b1ccc425490a38e6f0a9b049292588 Item Level: 83 Quality: 0 Sockets: W-W-W LevelReq: 45 Implicits: 1 Has 1 Socket Has 2 Sockets Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown 10% increased Attack Speed +64 to maximum Life 5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks

Rarity: UNIQUE The Dark Seer Shadow Sceptre Unique ID: b00860c5b33fe93374c607ab8812646e2aab18d58137a4728fe9cb7155e4554d Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-R-B LevelReq: 32 Implicits: 1 22% increased Elemental Damage +2 to Level of all Spell Skill Gems 10% Global chance to Blind Enemies on hit Enemies Blinded by you have Malediction +2 Maximum Energy Shield per Level +2 Maximum Mana per Level Unaffected by Blind

Rarity: UNIQUE Mask of the Tribunal Magistrate Crown Armour: 519 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.4483 Energy Shield: 108 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.5 Unique ID: d6b85acfb1f0dd3e0545bd7dbf7317fa65398a7643382205dd7c2c29605bba40 Item Level: 87 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-B-G-B LevelReq: 58 Implicits: 3 +14 to Intelligence Minions deal 8% increased Damage 15% increased effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills +26 to all Attributes 150% increased Armour and Energy Shield Nearby Allies have 1% Chance to Block Attack Damage per 100 Strength you have Nearby Allies have +7% to Critical Strike Multiplier per 100 Dexterity you have Nearby Allies have 4% increased Cast Speed per 100 Intelligence you have 2% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills per 250 total Attributes

Rarity: UNIQUE Foulborn Matua Tupuna Tarnished Spirit Shield Energy Shield: 35 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.7845 Unique ID: 92ed9f75fc7e8f62fb7e292b4c90c9d9b33ab64f3493735c2710704d4a6d75a4 Item Level: 83 Quality: 0 Sockets: G-B-R LevelReq: 23 Implicits: 1 +2 to Level of Socketed Aura Gems 45% increased Energy Shield +17 to maximum Mana 20% increased effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills on your Minions 20% increased effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills Spreads Tar when you Block {mutated}+2 to Level of Socketed Aura Gems Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE The Hand of Phrecia Mesh Gloves Armour: 109 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.1092 Energy Shield: 22 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0 Unique ID: de11fca537cc00955f0e887c62c723cfc7c14835a6751ce3c8b5471a4bf0aed8 Item Level: 84 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-R-B-B LevelReq: 32 Implicits: 2 +2 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems Curse Enemies with Despair on Hit 54% increased Armour and Energy Shield +10% to all Elemental Resistances 40% increased Effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills while you have a Linked Target Linked Targets always count as in range of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills Non-Curse Auras from your Skills only apply to you and Linked Targets Corrupted
